message:
test(fuzz): add Provenance construction API + TaintLevel ordering fuzz (resolves qrey5)

Provenance construction API (capability.rs:2540-2603): new(zone),
tainted(zone), highly_tainted(zone), with_step(step), elevated_with(token).

Distinct from provenance_record_merge (hpgza) which fuzzes
ProvenanceRecord::merge MIN/MAX/OR rules — this fuzzes the
construction state machine.

Five properties driven over arbitrary StepSeed sequences and
constructor discriminator:
- new/tainted/highly_tainted defaults (chain empty, !elevated, no
  token) and correct taint level
- with_step appends exactly 1 to chain; appended step preserved
- elevated_with sets elevated=true, elevation_token=Some
- TaintLevel Ord lattice: Untainted < Tainted < HighlyTainted
- TaintLevel default = Untainted

Once-gated regression anchors:
- each constructor's documented taint level
- TaintLevel pairwise lattice ordering + default
- chained with_step preserves order
- elevated_with stores the token verbatim

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -829,5 +829,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_provenance_construction"
+path = "fuzz_targets/provenance_construction.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
